text.title: AI Acceptance Criteria Generator Reviewer Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a reviewer-rubric deliverable. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

example.title: Valid rubric output
example.note: Evidence on every score; weights frozen; ≥2 raters.

example.title: Invalid — scores without evidence
example.note: evidence_refs empty → schema violation; fails rule r2.

list.item: post-hoc weight changes after weights_locked_at (rule r4)
missing anchors_1_3_5 for any dimension (rule r1)
Average scores across raters only after reconciliation when divergence > 1.
